caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones sits in a recording studio in front of a dark, sound-dampening foam wall. He is positioned behind a professional microphone mounted on a shock mount, which features the text "BlueMicrophone" on its arm. A tattoo is visible on his right bicep. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right arm. He begins with his arm extended and his hand partially out of view, then moves his arm and hand closer to his body, ending with his hand raised and fingers slightly curled in a conversational gesture. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the upper half of the man's body as he interacts with someone off-screen.
